emails.subject: BPA Feb. losses
emails.body: BPA Feb. losses Bill- Please be advised that we have been billed for BPA tranny and I have entered deal 676688.1 for February 2001 losses. Thanks, Virginia

emails.subject: RE: BPA Feb. losses
emails.body: Bill, You look pretty involved in a conversation. Let me know when you have a minute. Is this WAPA thing anything that I know about already? VA

emails.subject: RE: BPA Feb. losses
emails.body: RE: BPA Feb. losses Virginia, I have a dispute for you and Mike regarding WAPA on June 2nd. Please come see me when you have a chance. Thanks, Bill

emails.subject: RE: BPA Feb. losses
emails.body: Just come by when you have a chance or give me a call and let me know when you will be free. Thanks, Bill
